allow: Bash(# Try to login with a test account to test the messaging flow curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/login -X POST -H ""Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"" -d ""username=test@test.com&password=test123"")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI2Iiwicm9sZSI6InBhdGllbnQiLCJleHAiOjE3NzIxOTExNjcsImlhdCI6MTc3MjE4OTM2NywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.yyz5d6YsaPRZMOlzSczvE-uq1EWu9Wm-wwLn1WZWVjg" echo "=== GET /users/me/clinician ===" curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/api/v1/users/me/clinician -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET /messages/thread/5 ===" curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/messages/thread/5?limit=50" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET /users/me ===" curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/api/v1/users/me -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")
Bash(sqlite3 adaptiv_health.db "ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN read_at TIMESTAMP NULL;")
